appliedUpdates.description: Updated architecture.md to include get_current_feature(), get_next_feature(), and validate_status_transition() in the engine.py function list. These were added by the features-json-support feature but not documented.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a convention note clarifying hook naming: entry points registered in hooks.json are .sh bash wrappers (phase-guard.sh, mission-continue.sh, mission-reminder.sh), while the actual implementation is in .py files. Documentation should use the registered entry point name (.sh) when referring to hook configuration, and .py when referring to implementation details.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: commands/enter-mission.md references hooks as .py files, CLAUDE.md references them as .sh files, hooks.json registers .sh wrappers. Inconsistency found across commands-update-v1 and existing documentation.
